teams.title: Teams
teams.emptyDesc: Create your first team to organize your people.
teams.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this team?
teams.dangerZoneDesc: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
teams.noMembers: No members yet. Add members to get started.
teams.name: Name
teams.description: Organize your people into teams for better collaboration.

create.title: Create Team
create.description: Create a new team and optionally assign a team lead.
create.descriptionHint: Describe the team's mission and focus areas — this helps AI generate better session evaluations.
create.descriptionTooltip: The team description is included in AI session analysis. A good description includes: the team's purpose, key responsibilities, current priorities, and what success looks like. The more context you provide, the more relevant the AI insights will be for this team's members.
